case_title: SEMAN(FELEKE) MIRGA VS. YELLOW CAB OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRGA, SEMAN(FELEKE) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,113.88 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,238.88 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,529.82 FILED BY MIRGA, SEMAN(FELEKE) AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-22-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SEMAN (FELEKE) MIRGA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID HANLEY, RISK MANAGER AND PAUL MRABE, ACCOUNTANT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FLE. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER TO CONTINUE. NO JPT STIPULATION.

COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
